comment: Export to JSON plugin for PHPMyAdmin

data.name: Dhaka
data.description: Capital and largest city of Bangladesh; political and economic hub with extremely high density.

data.name: Chattogram
data.description: Major port city and industrial centre; second-largest urban area in Bangladesh.

data.name: Sylhet
data.description: Northeast regional city; economic hub with tea agriculture and cultural heritage significance.

data.name: Rajshahi
data.description: Northern city known for education and silk production; regional commerce centre.

data.name: Bogura
data.description: Growing urban centre in the north; commercial and transit node.

data.name: Khulna
data.description: Industrial and port-adjacent city in the southwest; major jute processing and manufacturing industries.

data.name: Comilla
data.description: Historical and commercial city near the Indian border; transport hub.

data.name: Barisal
data.description: Riverine city in the south; administrative and inland water commerce centre.

data.name: Mymensingh
data.description: Administrative and educational centre; strong service and agriculture economies.

data.name: Rangpur
data.description: Northern regional capital; agrarian and trade hub with growing industry.

data.name: Gazipur
data.description: Rapidly expanding industrial suburb of Dhaka; significant manufacturing base.

data.name: Narayanganj
data.description: Part of Greater Dhaka; commercial port and textile centre.

data.name: Tangail
data.description: Large district city; textiles and trade; commuter link to Dhaka.

data.name: Sirajganj
data.description: Riverine trade city on the Jamuna; commerce and grain markets.

data.name: Pabna
data.description: Historic market city with agricultural and light industrial activity.

data.name: Chandpur
data.description: City at the confluence of Padma and Meghna rivers; fishery and shipbuilding traditions.

data.name: Feni
data.description: Transit junction city near Chattogram; road and rail links to eastern Bangladesh.

data.name: Dinajpur
data.description: Northern city with grain markets and logistics; satellite industry.

data.name: Jamalpur
data.description: Trade and administrative node; agricultural service town.

data.name: Satkhira
data.description: Border city near Sundarbans; cross-border trade and fisheries.

data.name: Kushtia
data.description: Western city known for cultural heritage, riverside geography, and growing textile industry.
